skills.name: verify-release
skills.description: confirm a goreleaser-driven release actually shipped
skills.procedure:
1. gh run list --repo polyxmedia/mnemos --limit 3 — check Release workflow conclusion
2. gh release view vX.Y.Z — confirm assets: 5 binaries + checksums.txt
3. curl the install.sh and run against a throwaway HOME
4. if failure, gh run view NNN --log-failed to find the goreleaser error

skills.name: add-storage-method
skills.description: add a new method to the observation store
skills.procedure:
1. declare in the appropriate memory.Reader / Writer / Maintenance / Exportable / Vectorable interface
2. implement in internal/storage/observations.go (or sessions.go / skills.go)
3. pass time.Now().UTC() explicitly for any bi-temporal columns
4. add test in internal/storage/*_test.go (use openObsDB helper)
5. if consumed by a service, wire through at the Config boundary
skills.pitfalls: putting the method on Store instead of the narrowest interface; using CURRENT_TIMESTAMP on a bi-temporal column

skills.name: add-mcp-tool
skills.description: add a new MCP tool via the official Go SDK
skills.procedure:
1. define args struct with json and jsonschema tags in internal/mcp/tools.go
2. add handler method (ctx, *CallToolRequest, args) (*CallToolResult, any, error)
3. register via mcpsdk.AddTool in registerTools()
4. add integration test in server_test.go using NewInMemoryTransports
5. update docs/MCP_TOOLS.md + README tool list
skills.pitfalls: forget the jsonschema struct tags and the SDK cant infer descriptions; forget to register and the tool is invisible

skills.name: ship-a-feature
skills.description: ship a feature end-to-end: tests → commit → push → release
skills.procedure:
1. go test ./... -race -count=1 (must pass)
2. golangci-lint run ./... (must be 0 issues)
3. manual smoke test the feature via bin/mnemos
4. git add -A && git commit -m "feat: ..." with no AI attribution
5. git push
6. when ready, make release V=vX.Y.Z
7. wait for goreleaser workflow; verify gh release view vX.Y.Z shows assets
